name: G-MODEアーカイブス22 ヘラクレスの栄光Ⅲ 神々の沈黙
slug: g-modeアーカイブス22-ヘラクレスの栄光ⅲ-神々の沈黙
short_description: A heartfelt masterpiece RPG woven by gods and humans— The series' most captivating story is revived in G-MODE Archives!
detailed_description:
A heartfelt masterpiece RPG woven by gods and humans—
The series' most captivating story is revived in G-MODE Archives!

Inspired by Greek mythology, "Glory of Heracles" is a legendary RPG series.

Since the release of the first game, Tōjin Makyō-den: Heracles no Eikō, in 1987, this beloved RPG series has told countless stories across multiple platforms.

Among the series, this title is especially renowned for having the best storyline of them all.

【Game System】

This game features a command-based RPG system.

As time passes, the world shifts between day and night, affecting the characters you meet and the shops available.

With seven distinct weapon types and powerful magic learned from temples, players must overcome formidable foes.

For weaker enemies, the Auto-Battle Mode allows characters to fight automatically using basic attacks, making battles smoother and more efficient.

【Story】

The setting is Ancient Greece.

For centuries, peace has reigned.

Emotions like suffering and sorrow have long faded, buried deep within the memories of past generations.

The gods of the heavens, watching over this tranquil paradise, took great satisfaction in seeing the world they created flourish.

However, even in such an era, there was one god who never took his eyes off the human realm.

That god was Zeus, the supreme ruler of Olympus and the great creator of all things.

With his ever-watchful gaze, Zeus observed the world below, missing no detail—no matter how small.

And soon, he began to notice something.

A subtle yet undeniable shift in the peaceful paradise…
